findingDetails.title: Parent spec Phase 2 status marked 'Draft' but child spec reports 'Complete'
findingDetails.evidence: Parent Phase Documentation Map shows 002 as Draft, but 002's spec.md §1 Metadata shows Status: Complete and implementation-summary.md confirms completion

findingDetails.title: Phase 1→2 handoff verification evidence not explicitly cited
findingDetails.evidence: Handoff criteria says 'exact search for references/specific returns no hits' which 001's verification confirms, but no explicit confirmation that 002 received the handoff

findingDetails.title: Phase 004 completion_pct=90 but next_safe_action mentions dispatching this review
findingDetails.evidence: completion_pct=90 with open question about F-001 remediation; review expected to close the gap
